output.sparql:
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?species ?speciesLabel WHERE {
  wd:Q44299 wdt:P171 ?coyoteGenus .
  ?coyoteGenus wdt:P171 ?family .
  ?family wdt:P31 wd:Q34946 .
  ?species wdt:P171 ?genus .
  ?genus wdt:P171 ?family .
  ?species wdt:P31 wd:Q16521 .
  ?species rdfs:label ?speciesLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?speciesLabel) = 'en')
  FILTER(?species != wd:Q44299)
}

output.answer: Other animals in the Canidae family include the African wolf, gray wolf (Canis lupus), domestic dog (Canis lupus familiaris), red fox (Vulpes vulpes), and various species of jackals, among others. A complete list would contain many canids such as Canis latrans (coyote itself is excluded per the query).
